scripts.build: npm install && tsc && vite build && node ./src/modify-html.cjs && webflow extension bundle && node cmd/rename-bundle-zip-file.js
scripts.build:staging: npm install && tsc && vite build --mode staging && node ./src/modify-html.cjs && webflow extension bundle && BUILD_MODE=staging node cmd/rename-bundle-zip-file.js
scripts.build:production: npm install && tsc && vite build --mode production && node ./src/modify-html.cjs && webflow extension bundle && BUILD_MODE=production node cmd/rename-bundle-zip-file.js
